description: Example PRD — replace with your own user stories

userStories.title: Example: Add health check endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a /health endpoint so that monitoring tools can verify the service is running.

userStories.title: Example: Add request logging middleware
userStories.description: As an operator, I want all incoming requests logged so that I can debug issues in production.
acceptanceCriteria: Each request logs: method, path, status code, duration in ms
Logs go to stdout in structured JSON format
Logging does not break existing functionality
